releases.title: v3.4.59
releases.summary: - Shows Event-local schedule notification history under expanded schedule rows. - Makes draft/sent notification records visible after they are created or when the Event drawer is reopened. - Keeps the readback local and informational: no push, email, device delivery, inbox, or read receipts.

releases.title: v3.4.58
releases.summary: - Adds an Event-local selected-recipient notification record for schedule changes. - Lets schedule change previews become either a saved draft or a local sent notice. - Keeps notification delivery intentionally local: no push, email, device registration, realtime presence, or broad broadcast behavior.
